Xun Tao иҚҖзҮҫ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xun Tao (иҚҖзҮҫ). Son of Xun Shu, uncle to Xun Yu, one of the вҖҳEight DragonsвҖҷ Xun Tao was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
